# Md5Key.Parse method

Parse a 32-character (16-byte) lowercase/uppercase hex string. Shorter even-length hex is accepted and right-zero-padded (truncated keys, e.g. a 9-byte index key, are valid).

public static Md5Key Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> hex)
